6:
WITH cust_czk AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT t.CustomerID
    FROM "transactions_1k" t
    JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND strftime('%Y', t.Date) = '2013'
),
cons_2013 AS (
    SELECT ym.CustomerID,
           SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption,
           AVG(ym.Consumption) AS avg_consumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    WHERE strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2013'
    GROUP BY ym.CustomerID
),
seg_min AS (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           cons.avg_consumption
    FROM customers c
    JOIN cons_2013 cons ON c.CustomerID = cons.CustomerID
    JOIN cust_czk chk ON c.CustomerID = chk.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
      AND cons.total_consumption = (
          SELECT MIN(cons2.total_consumption)
          FROM cons_2013 cons2
          JOIN customers c2 ON cons2.CustomerID = c2.CustomerID
          JOIN cust_czk chk2 ON c2.CustomerID = chk2.CustomerID
          WHERE c2.Segment = c.Segment
      )
)
SELECT
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM seg_min
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
WITH seg_year AS (
    SELECT
        c.Segment,
        CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2012' THEN '2012'
             WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013' THEN '2013'
        END AS yr,
        ym.Consumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND substr(ym.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
),
agg AS (
    SELECT
        Segment,
        SUM(CASE WHEN yr = '2012' THEN Consumption END) AS cons_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN yr = '2013' THEN Consumption END) AS cons_2013
    FROM seg_year
    GROUP BY Segment
),
pct AS (
    SELECT
        Segment,
        CASE WHEN cons_2012 = 0 THEN NULL
             ELSE (cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0 / cons_2012
        END AS pct_increase
    FROM agg
)
SELECT Segment AS biggest_increase
FROM pct
WHERE pct_increase IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment AS lowest_increase
FROM pct
WHERE pct_increase IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY pct_increase ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH stats AS (
  SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission='Inpatient' AND SEX='Male' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_in,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission='Inpatient' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_in,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission='Outpatient' AND SEX='Male' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_out,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission='Outpatient' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_out
  FROM Patient
)
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN male_in > male_out THEN 'Inpatient' ELSE 'Outpatient' END AS more,
  ABS((male_in * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_in,0)) - (male_out * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_out,0))) AS deviation_percent
FROM stats;	----- bird -----	thrombosis_prediction

WITH female_age AS (
    SELECT client_id,
           (julianday('now') - julianday(birth_date))/365.25 AS age
    FROM client
    WHERE gender = 'Female'
),
max_female_age AS (
    SELECT MAX(age) AS max_age FROM female_age
),
oldest_female AS (
    SELECT client_id FROM female_age
    WHERE age = (SELECT max_age FROM max_female_age)
),
client_avg AS (
    SELECT d.client_id,
           AVG(t.amount) AS avg_salary
    FROM disp d
    JOIN trans t ON d.account_id = t.account_id
    GROUP BY d.client_id
),
oldest_female_avg AS (
    SELECT of.client_id, ca.avg_salary
    FROM oldest_female of
    JOIN client_avg ca ON of.client_id = ca.client_id
),
lowest_avg AS (
    SELECT MIN(avg_salary) AS lowest_avg FROM oldest_female_avg
),
highest_avg AS (
    SELECT MAX(avg_salary) AS highest_avg FROM client_avg
),
gap_val AS (
    SELECT (h.highest_avg - l.lowest_avg) AS gap
    FROM highest_avg h, lowest_avg l
)
SELECT a.account_id, g.gap
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN oldest_female_avg ofa ON d.client_id = ofa.client_id
JOIN lowest_avg l ON ofa.avg_salary = l.lowest_avg
CROSS JOIN gap_val g;	----- bird -----	financial

WITH female_clients AS (
  SELECT c.client_id,
         c.birth_date,
         (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', c.birth_date)) -
         (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', c.birth_date)) AS age
  FROM client c
  WHERE c.gender = 'Female'
),
client_loan_avg AS (
  SELECT fc.client_id,
         AVG(l.amount) AS avg_salary
  FROM female_clients fc
  JOIN disp d ON fc.client_id = d.client_id
  JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
  LEFT JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
  GROUP BY fc.client_id
),
oldest AS (
  SELECT client_id
  FROM female_clients
  WHERE age = (SELECT MAX(age) FROM female_clients)
),
min_avg AS (
  SELECT client_id
  FROM client_loan_avg
  WHERE client_id IN (SELECT client_id FROM oldest)
    AND avg_salary = (SELECT MIN(avg_salary) FROM client_loan_avg WHERE client_id IN (SELECT client_id FROM oldest))
)
SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id
FROM min_avg ma
JOIN disp d ON ma.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id;	----- bird -----	financial
